title: Transport Domesticated Creatures
description: This mod allows you to save your tamed mobs in the SpiritOrb, allowing you to conveniently transport them to places you can't access with them.
body:
Hi, I'm SrKtwll, and I'm introducing my first mod, which has a simple but useful purpose! I hope you like it!

Transport Domesticated Creatures 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Vf0q5FbuIFI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/540897dcf3cb2e3e2dcbefc594d5cf06cb9c0119.png)

This mod allows you to transport your tamed mobs more comfortably to places you can't access with them. "You want to venture into your world on your mount and you come across a cave. What do you do with it? With SpiritOrb, you can save it in your item to continue your journey.



 Allowed Mobs:

-Wolves

-Cats

-Parrots

-Horses

-etc.



It supports several mods that include tameable creatures, such as:

-Traditional Taming - isTame() + getOwnerUUID() 

-Mounts - isTamed() + getOwnerUUID()

Finally, it has security against other players, who won't be able to capture your tamed mobs with their SpiritOrb.
